name: Production QA Sweep
summary: Run the final quality sweep, clear baseline validation debt, and document any remaining manual blockers.

notes: Repo-wide build, lint, type-check, and test sweeps now pass from the root workspace.
The closure QA report captures sign-in, devices, workouts, runs, notifications, metrics, and payment status in one place.
Remaining blockers are external environment or portal tasks: Google OAuth setup, Apple Sign-In configuration, APNs provisioning, and live Stripe or Apple Pay validation.

discovered_work: Cleared the remaining hard-gate lint debt by disabling the web fast-refresh rule for generated src/components/ui files, removing the stale StorePage console suppressions, and adding local flat ESLint configs for worker and realtime.
Ran the broad repo-wide validation sweep successfully with npm run build, npm run lint, npm run type-check, npm run test, and a fresh iOS simulator xcodebuild.
Captured the final cross-surface status and remaining portal or configuration blockers in conductor/tracks/production_qa_sweep_20260411/qa-report.md.
blockers: Google OAuth browser and iOS client IDs plus redirect configuration still require manual environment and console setup.
Apple Sign-In portal configuration for the service or app identifiers used by web and iOS remains an external prerequisite.
APNs credentials are still required to verify end-to-end push notification delivery outside the simulator.
Live Stripe and Apple Pay verification still depends on external credential and merchant certificate setup.
